title: Bare Bones - Creeper Variants
description: Biome specific creeper variants for Bare Bones
body:
This resource pack adds 24 different creeper variations for different biomes (14 of which can spawn naturally). Each creeper is based off the colour and texture of the local flora in order to blend in better.

The creepers are designed to blend in with the default [_Bare Bones_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack, and PrincParshia's [_Bare Bones - Better leaves_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-better-leaves) resource pack. Credits to them for the original textures.

For a vanilla alternative, I recommend [_Modern Creepers._](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-creepers)

---

Requires [_Entity Texture Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

Click here for the version of this pack supporting [_Fresh Animations_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-x-bare-bones-creeper-variants). 
\
Note that it is _not_ and addon pack. You will not need this vanilla version if you use the Fresh Animations one.

---

# Creeper Variants

![warm green creepers in a savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/850c0bdb96cb61495028a3bfcef72a9833d1bb8e.png)
Acacia creepers, spawning in savannas.

![green creepers in a cave with pink azaleas on them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf09fa9fccc39dce0682cd5a8fee622a7d8734d.png)
Azalea creepers, spawning in lush caves.

![green creepers in a forest with different leafy textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bff980cb2c69200d1c99360bdbc8280db810a847.png)
Birch and oak creepers, spawning in forests and plains.

![creepers in a desert disguised as cacti](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a849034d5aa86bb48a7e09781badb4e09645cf78.png)
Cactus creepers, spawning in deserts and badlands.

![Pink creepers among cherry blossoms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0b1ef5f878ce802e42cc86e4d4135e088e38ab.png)
Cherry blossom creepers, spawning in cherry groves.

![Light green creepers in a spruce forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89d5cde9625e7878465ef186ec074fc944d9b41c.png)
Light spruce creepers, spawning in grassy spruce forests and other cold areas.

![Dark green creepers among snowy spruce trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9d0426d4be6e74c12aa13b17ef14214a0093709.png)
Dark spruce creepers, spawning in snowy mountains and forests.

![Dark green creepers in a dark oak forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c216bd326a151fa334826ddac182d058248ccc23_0.webp)
Dark oak creepers, spawning in dark forests and swamps.

![Grey creepers in a pale garden forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bd02fcc652c6eb4bfa3e3479318c0bbe0199a6_0.webp)
Pale oak creepers, spawning in the pale garden.

![Two grey viny creepers in a mineshaft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc23fb704bc553a1c93c7196a4e9773d371fbdec.png)
Glow lichen creepers, spawning in dripstone caves, the deep dark, and any cave below y-level 30.

![Bright green creepers in a jungle in front of a jungle temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d260c96f39ce76392dc6c659536b18b056dbda.png)
Jungle creepers, spawning in jungles and bamboo forests.

![Two green creepers in the mud of a mangrove swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00e0aa581d7b8ef34e47964d94a5e280502a7b76.png)
Mangrove creepers, spawning in the mangrove swamp.

![Two blue charged creepers in a plains biome during a thunderstorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18b1bbd5da8ce1bcf73eff78283bb280a4c0664c.png)
Charged creepers, converted when struck by lightning.

---

## The variants below cannot spawn naturally in survival

![two grey creepers in a mushroom island among mooshrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c58ae5aa9b997f94e2fa1ea11d5f60403d5c7d9.png)
Mycelium creepers, spawning in mushroom fields.

![5 colourful creepers in an ocean above a coral reef](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f80ac5280db3bee3949a2269a1d7d60892ca240b.png)
Coral creepers, spawning in coral reefs and warm oceans.

![Two sculk creepers in a deep dark biome cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3995ddfffbbfe04511bc183800bfdd5966ebf83.png)
Sculk creepers, spawning in the deep dark.

![Two red creepers in a crimson forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e8428b0ab95d73f78c10d588495f3397de5e75.png)
Crimson creepers, spawning in the nether wastes and crimson forest.

![Two turquoise warped creepers in a warped forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e2bbc9fdddba7167754e0fb070848f7c8717c4c.png)
Warped creepers, spawning in warped forests and soul sand valleys.

![Two purple creepers next to chorus trees in the end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1f0118f4ce353b4e023a0c1fe50e5b344ca325d.png)
Chorus creepers, spawning in the end.
